components.title: NEMA 23-class stepper motor candidate
components.vendor: Unselected; Oriental Motor PKP is a research reference only
components.summary: A procurement candidate for the first belt-driven linear-axis demo. The frame label alone does not establish shaft, pilot, mounting-hole pattern, length, torque-speed curve, winding, driver, encoder, brake, or thermal capability.

facts.name: reference_product_family
facts.value: Oriental Motor PKP 56.4 mm / NEMA 23 category
facts.note: This is a research reference, not a selected motor or a transferable mounting specification.

facts.name: intended_demo_role
facts.note: Select only after payload, speed, acceleration, duty cycle, and holding requirements are known.

required_selection_inputs: travel, speed, acceleration, and duty cycle
exact supplier drawing and speed-torque curve
components.agent_guidance: Never generate a motor plate, shaft coupling, wiring, torque calculation, or BOM line from the NEMA class alone. Require an exact part number and controlled drawing.

components.title: HIWIN MG-series miniature linear guideway candidate
components.summary: A compact linear-guide family candidate for axis and gripper carriage guidance. Exact rail size, block length, preload, accuracy class, lubrication, mounting, load/moment rating, and paired-rail configuration are unselected.

facts.name: reference_family_variants
facts.value: MGN narrow and MGW wide families
facts.note: Family availability is not a selection or compatibility claim.

required_selection_inputs: external force and moment load cases
rail/block exact drawing and preload class
components.agent_guidance: Do not infer MGN/MGW dimensions or load ratings. Use the current exact HIWIN drawing and calculate load distribution and life with qualified review.

components.title: Gates PowerGrip GT3 synchronous-belt candidate
components.summary: A candidate family for a compact belt-driven linear axis. Profile, pitch, width, pitch length, pulley tooth count, tension, service factor, and belt clamp design remain unselected.
components.agent_guidance: Use only a profile-matched belt and pulley. Do not derive belt tension, allowable load, tooth engagement, or clamp geometry from this candidate record.

components.title: Timing-pulley candidate
components.summary: A pulley to be selected with the exact belt profile and motor shaft. The bore, hub, keyway or clamp, retention method, concentricity, tooth count, and material are not defined by this record.

facts.name: intended_demo_role
facts.value: motor or idler pulley in a synchronous belt path

components.agent_guidance: Never assume a generic pulley profile, bore, or retention scheme. Link the selected pulley to its exact belt and shaft interfaces.

components.title: Linear-axis structural rail or frame
components.summary: Custom or modular structural member representing the axis backbone. It establishes assembly datums but has no material, extrusion family, cross section, stiffness, or fastener specification.

facts.name: intended_demo_role
facts.value: primary reference structure for linear-axis components

components.agent_guidance: Model this only as a placeholder envelope until a structural calculation and material/process selection have been reviewed.

components.title: Linear-axis carriage plate
components.summary: A custom plate that joins guide blocks, belt termination, and the payload interface. Exact material, thickness, tolerances, stiffness, and fasteners are unselected.
components.agent_guidance: Do not dimension this part until the exact guide block, belt clamp, payload, datum scheme, and load case are present.

components.title: Linear-axis motor mount
components.summary: A custom bracket or plate to locate an exact motor and establish pulley alignment. It contains no released motor pattern, plate thickness, material, or resonance assessment.
components.agent_guidance: Do not assign mounting holes from the motor class. Generate this part only from an exact controlled motor drawing.

components.title: Linear-axis end-stop and homing sensor candidate
components.summary: A candidate sensing and hard-stop arrangement for homing and travel protection. Sensor technology, wiring, target geometry, repeatability, diagnostics, and safety category are unselected.
components.agent_guidance: A normal homing switch is not automatically a safety-rated limit. Keep hard stops, controls, and risk controls as separate design decisions.

components.title: Motion controller and motor-driver candidate
components.summary: A controller/driver placeholder for the axis, gripper, pan-tilt, or actuator. Electrical ratings, command protocol, feedback support, braking behavior, diagnostics, enclosure, and safety functions are unselected.
components.agent_guidance: Do not generate wiring, connector pin-outs, current limits, or control gains from a placeholder controller.

components.title: Parallel-jaw gripper body
components.summary: A custom gripper chassis containing guideways, drive, jaw interfaces, and a tool-side mount. It is a topology placeholder, not a load-rated or certified end effector.
components.agent_guidance: Do not claim grip force, stroke, accuracy, or payload until force transmission and all structural/load paths are calculated and verified.

components.title: Parallel-jaw gripper lead-screw drive candidate
components.summary: A candidate actuation topology for converting motor rotation into symmetric jaw motion. Screw size, lead, nut type, backlash, efficiency, bearing support, motor, and transmission are unselected.
components.agent_guidance: Use a kinematic placeholder only. Calculate efficiency, buckling, wear, backdrive behavior, and fail-safe behavior from selected parts.

components.title: Custom parallel gripper jaw set
components.summary: A paired, replaceable set of jaws or fingertips. Geometry, material, surface, compliance, fasteners, workpiece retention, and collision envelope are unselected.
components.agent_guidance: Treat jaw geometry as application-specific tooling. Require grasp analysis and a workpiece model before presenting a design as usable.

components.title: Compact rotary actuator candidate
components.summary: A generic actuated rotary module for pan and tilt axes. Motor, gearbox, encoder, brake, bearing, cable path, torque-speed envelope, backlash, and mounting geometry are unselected.
required_selection_inputs: exact actuator drawing and performance data
components.agent_guidance: Do not calculate joint torque or set limits from a generic actuator. Resolve the payload inertia, gravity moment, cable forces, and exact model data first.

components.title: Pan-tilt base and yoke
components.summary: A multi-part base/yoke concept that carries pan and tilt actuators and establishes sensor frames. Material, stiffness, balance, travel stops, and mounting are unselected.
components.agent_guidance: Keep sensor optical/measurement frames explicit and separate from CAD-centre geometry. Verify field of view and cable clearance through motion.

components.title: Camera or LiDAR payload mount
components.summary: A custom adapter between a pan-tilt structure and an exact sensor. Sensor aperture, keep-out zones, thermal requirements, optical frame, mass, and fastener pattern are unselected.
components.agent_guidance: Do not model or obscure an optical window, LiDAR scan plane, connector, heat sink, or calibration target without exact supplier information.

components.title: Cable service-loop and strain-relief concept
components.summary: A geometric placeholder for a cable route across moving joints. Cable type, minimum bend radius, torsion rating, connector, clamp, EMC, and life target are unselected.
components.agent_guidance: Do not export a cable path as buildable harness geometry until selected cable bend/torsion limits and all joint poses have been checked.

components.title: Harmonic Drive CSG-17-100-2A-R component set
components.summary: A source-specific catalogue record for a strain-wave gear component set that can anchor the modular-actuator demo. It is not a complete actuator; motor adaptation, housing, bearing load path, encoder, cable exit, thermal design, and safety assessment remain custom engineering work.
components.agent_guidance: Expose every catalogue fact with its exact source ID and retrieval date. Do not turn torque limits into a system rating; validate load, life, mounting, thermal, and safety conditions against the current manufacturer documentation.

components.title: BLDC motor candidate for modular actuator
components.summary: A motor placeholder to drive the strain-wave gear component set. Exact motor dimensions, winding, shaft, encoder, thermal characteristics, speed-torque curve, insulation, and wiring are unselected.
components.agent_guidance: Select motor and gear together using their current vendor data. Do not infer compatibility or motor torque from the reducer ratio.

components.title: Modular actuator output flange
components.summary: A custom output adapter between a gear component set and robot link. Its bolt pattern, load path, material, bearing preload interaction, and sealing are unselected.
components.agent_guidance: The flange is part of the critical load path. Require reviewed bearing loads and current manufacturer constraints before modelling final geometry.

components.title: Modular actuator housing
components.summary: A custom enclosure concept for motor, gear component set, encoder, cable exit, and optional brake. It has no released thermal, structural, ingress, grounding, or manufacturing design.
components.agent_guidance: Do not claim compactness, heat dissipation, sealing, or serviceability from a placeholder housing.

components.title: Actuator absolute encoder candidate
components.summary: A feedback-device placeholder for the modular actuator. Measurement architecture, resolution, accuracy, output protocol, mounting, environmental rating, and calibration are unselected.
components.agent_guidance: Do not equate encoder resolution with joint accuracy. Retain calibration, mechanical compliance, backlash, and control effects in the verification plan.

components.title: Actuator holding-brake candidate
components.summary: An optional brake placeholder for a gravity-loaded or safety-sensitive joint. Brake type, holding torque, response, wear, power-loss behavior, monitoring, and safety function are unselected.
components.agent_guidance: A brake placeholder does not establish a safety function. Keep functional-safety design and risk assessment outside the CAD-only completion claim.
